title: Game Constants
description: Terrain and object constants used by AoE2:DE RMS scripts. Fields mirror the Breakdown reference-table columns from PLAN.md's UI section (constant ID, RMS constant, descriptive name, DE texture file), plus per-object resource amounts used for the Phase 2.5 status-bar resource totals. Machine-extracted from the game's data files by tools/extract-constants once that exists (Phase 4.0); hand-maintained subset until then — see PLAN.md 'Reference DB approach'.

constId.description: The internal DE numeric ID for this terrain/object. Null until confirmed — do not guess this value; it must come from the game's data files or a trusted community dump, not general knowledge.

rmsConstant.description: The exact identifier used in RMS scripts, e.g. GRASS, GOLD.

descriptiveName.description: Human-readable name for the reference table UI, e.g. "Grass 1", "Gold Mine".

deTextureFile.description: DE texture filename shown in the reference table (e.g. g_grs). Null until confirmed.

resourceAmounts.description: Per-object resource yield. Only meaningful for category: object resource nodes. Used by the Phase 2.5 status-bar totals.

verified.description: False means this entry (or some field on it — see notes) hasn't been checked against the game's actual data files yet. Treat unverified numeric fields (constId, resourceAmounts) as placeholders, not facts.

notes.description: Free text: what's unverified and why, sourcing, ambiguities.

constants.notes: Name/usage confirmed against the Definitive RMS Scripting Guide (Zetnus). constId and deTextureFile still need the real extraction script (Phase 4.0) or a trusted community dat-dump — do not treat null as 0.
resourceAmounts.gold is an illustrative placeholder, not sourced from verified game data — replace once confirmed.
